name: Heartbeat Project
description: Turn heartbeat into a continuous project worker. Manages long-running tasks across heartbeat sessions with reply-based feedback.

marker.description: Heartbeat message marker for reply detection (default: [🩷])

markerOnlyForTasks.description: Only add marker to task-related messages (default: false)

maxTasksInPrompt.description: Maximum active tasks injected per heartbeat tick (default: 5)

taskCooldownMinutes.description: Minutes of no progress before a task is deprioritized (default: 120)
